'''âr-p-t''' ('''karapat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:rud|rud]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-p-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rud|rud]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âr-p-t
|-
! Lemma
| karapat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thirapat|thirapat]] || [[word:jirapat|jirapat]] || [[word:shirapat|shirapat]] || [[word:kirapat|kirapat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthurapat|thuthurapat]] || [[word:jujurapat|jujurapat]] || [[word:shushurapat|shushurapat]] || [[word:kukurapat|kukurapat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thurapat|thurapat]] || [[word:jurapat|jurapat]] || [[word:shurapat|shurapat]] || [[word:kurapat|kurapat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thurapat|thurapat]] || [[word:jurapat|jurapat]] || [[word:shurapat|shurapat]] || [[word:kurapat|kurapat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:therapat|therapat]] || [[word:jerapat|jerapat]] || [[word:sherapat|sherapat]] || [[word:kerapat|kerapat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothorapat|thothorapat]] || [[word:jojorapat|jojorapat]] || [[word:shoshorapat|shoshorapat]] || [[word:kokorapat|kokorapat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thorapat|thorapat]] || [[word:jorapat|jorapat]] || [[word:shorapat|shorapat]] || [[word:korapat|korapat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thorapat|thorapat]] || [[word:jorapat|jorapat]] || [[word:shorapat|shorapat]] || [[word:korapat|korapat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠrapat|thĂŠrapat]] || [[word:jĂŠrapat|jĂŠrapat]] || [[word:shĂŠrapat|shĂŠrapat]] || [[word:kĂŠrapat|kĂŠrapat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thatharapat|thatharapat]] || [[word:jajarapat|jajarapat]] || [[word:shasharapat|shasharapat]] || [[word:kakarapat|kakarapat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:tharapat|tharapat]] || [[word:jarapat|jarapat]] || [[word:sharapat|sharapat]] || [[word:karapat|karapat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:tharapat|tharapat]] || [[word:jarapat|jarapat]] || [[word:sharapat|sharapat]] || [[word:karapat|karapat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:sharapat|sharapat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gosharapat|gosharapat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokisharapat|gokisharapat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:sharapatnĂŒ|sharapatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gosharapatnknĂŒ|gosharapatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokisharapatnĂŒ|gokisharapatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:sharapatshĂ«|sharapatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gosharapatnkshĂ«|gosharapatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokisharapatshĂ«|gokisharapatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharapatro|sharapatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharapatnkro|gosharapatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharapatro|gokisharapatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:sharapatmu|sharapatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharapatnkmu|gosharapatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharapatmu|gokisharapatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:sharapatsher|sharapatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gosharapatnksher|gosharapatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokisharapatsher|gokisharapatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:sharapatng|sharapatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gosharapatnkng|gosharapatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokisharapatng|gokisharapatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:sharapatya|sharapatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gosharapatnkya|gosharapatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokisharapatya|gokisharapatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:sharapatyam|sharapatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gosharapatnkyam|gosharapatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokisharapatyam|gokisharapatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharapatnĂŒshĂ«|sharapatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharapatnknĂŒshĂ«|gosharapatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharapatnĂŒshĂ«|gokisharapatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharapatnĂŒro|sharapatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharapatnknĂŒro|gosharapatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharapatnĂŒro|gokisharapatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharapatnĂŒmu|sharapatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharapatnknĂŒmu|gosharapatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharapatnĂŒmu|gokisharapatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharapatshĂ«nĂŒ|sharapatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharapatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|gosharapatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharapatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokisharapatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharapatshĂ«ro|sharapatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharapatnkshĂ«ro|gosharapatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharapatshĂ«ro|gokisharapatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharapatshĂ«mu|sharapatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharapatnkshĂ«mu|gosharapatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharapatshĂ«mu|gokisharapatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharapatronĂŒ|sharapatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharapatnkronĂŒ|gosharapatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharapatronĂŒ|gokisharapatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharapatroshĂ«|sharapatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharapatnkroshĂ«|gosharapatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharapatroshĂ«|gokisharapatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:sharapatromu|sharapatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gosharapatnkromu|gosharapatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokisharapatromu|gokisharapatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:sharapatmunĂŒ|sharapatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gosharapatnkmunĂŒ|gosharapatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokisharapatmunĂŒ|gokisharapatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:sharapatmushĂ«|sharapatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gosharapatnkmushĂ«|gosharapatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokisharapatmushĂ«|gokisharapatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:sharapatmuro|sharapatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gosharapatnkmuro|gosharapatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokisharapatmuro|gokisharapatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
